Notice Of Motion Andotion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement Consent Judgemnt
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRIAN JOHNSON, ESQ., 510.848.8880, FOR PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition was filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code. Order signed in open court. Moving party to submit proposed consent judgment (approved as to form and content by apposing counsel) for the Court's signature. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
